project_type: Single-file HTML/CSS/JS electrical dimensioning app (Danish market)
build_system: None - single HTML file, no bundler
test_framework: Custom headless test runner (node test-sld.js) using assert module, with DOM mocks
build_command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('el-dimensionering.html','utf8'); const m=html.match(/<script>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/); if(!m){process.exit(1)} const c=m[1].replace(/^const /gm,'var ').replace(/^let /gm,'var ').replace(/renderNav.*renderModule.*activeModule.*;/,'').replace(/\(function.*verBadge.*\)\(\);/,''); try{eval(c);console.log('Syntax OK')}catch(e){console.error(e);process.exit(1)}"
verification_instructions: 1. Run node test-sld.js - all 52 existing tests must pass plus new Brain tests. 2. Verify the HTML file can be parsed by extracting and eval-ing the script block.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - pure single-file app. Node.js is pre-installed for testing.
environment_constraints: Open internet available. No npm packages needed - everything is inline.
contribution_requirements: All code goes in el-dimensionering.html inline. Tests go in test-sld.js. No external dependencies. Click-only UI (zero typing). Trilingual (da/en/fa with RTL). Life-safety critical calculations must be conservative.

key_patterns.module_registration: Modules are registered in T.da.modules, T.en.modules, T.fa.modules objects. Nav renders from these. renderModule() switch statement routes to render functions.
key_patterns.translation: T object with .da, .en, .fa keys. t(key) returns T[lang][key]. tx(da, en) shorthand for inline bilingual text. fa translations follow same pattern.
key_patterns.state_management: Module state in global variables (e.g., loadState, mcbState). No framework.
key_patterns.rendering: Functions like renderLoad(), renderFuse() return HTML strings. renderModule() sets innerHTML.
key_patterns.sld_tree: sldCreateNode(type, parentId, overrides) creates nodes. sldCreateTree() makes default tree. sldPropagateAll(tree) computes derived values (_ib, _zs, _vdrop, _ikmax, _ikmin).
key_patterns.products: PRODUCTS object has: cables, mcbs, mccbs, fuses, contactors, rcds, rcbos, spds, mpcbs, overloadRelays, wiringDevices
key_patterns.recommend_functions: recommendCables(ib, material), recommendMCBs(ib, ikmax), recommendMCCBs(ib, ikmax), recommendFuses(ib), recommendRCDs(ib, phases)
key_patterns.bid_module: priceFor(cat, product), addToBid(cat, id, qty), WHOLESALERS object, bidState with basket array
key_patterns.verification: sldVerifyNode(tree, nodeId) returns array of {rule, clause, status, detail} objects checking DS/HD 60364 compliance
key_patterns.styling: CSS custom properties, card-based layout, .sel-btn for selection buttons, .select-grid for button grids, .result-box for results
key_patterns.data_version: DATA_VERSION global string for version badge

directory_structure: Single HTML file app at /projects/sandbox/Claude/el-dimensionering.html with test file at /projects/sandbox/Claude/test-sld.js. All code is inline in the HTML file's <script> tag.
